mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 162 > history > The Inner Sphere enjoyed ten years peace ,
mechanics.excerpt: The Inner Sphere enjoyed ten years peace , which ended abruptly on 13 August 3049 FOURTH SUCCESSION WAR 20 August 3028 Hanse Davion and Melissa Steiner held their wedding Terra in the presence of their fellow Successor Lords_ At the reception following the wedding; as he fed Melissa piece wedding cake Prince Hanse announced, Wife in honor of our marriage _ in addition to this morsel give You vast prize_ love give You the Capellan Confederationl With those words Hanse Davion launched the Fourth Succession War.
